title: Robotic Surgery SPAC Fails Dramatically 📉 Stock Plummets!

transcript.text: So, Vicarious Surgical was just another
exciting spack. We covered over a
hundred disruptive technology spacks and
the vast majority of them handed Joe
Retail his ass on a rusty platter. The
thesis really sold itself. I mean, you
can look at the picture here, right? An
exciting robot, an exciting robot doing
surgeries, but it was a pre-revenue
spack. And one of the most important and
effective rules that we have is we don't
invest pre-revenue. No revenues, no
interest, no exceptions. Back when we
covered this in 2021, we concluded as
follows. We said, "We'll be on the
sidelines rooting for Vicarious and
we'll revisit the stock in 2023." Well,
there was nothing to revisit because
they didn't have any revenues. And since
we said that, the stock has lost 99% of
its
